user.title: PV History Forecast
user.description: The prefix defines the names of all sensors created (e.g. "sql_pv" → sensor.sql_pv_remaining_today / _min / _max / _tomorrow). Leave the database URL empty for the default HA database.

data.db_url: Database URL (optional — leave empty to use the default Home Assistant database)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure PV History Forecast
reconfigure.description:
Update the sensors for the existing entry.

If **no** cloud sensor is selected, the auto-sensor is kept automatically.

data.sensor_clouds: Cloud Coverage Sensor (Optional — leave empty: auto-sensor is kept, works from day 1)

sensors.title: Configure Sensors
sensors.description:
Select sensors from the dropdown lists.

If **no** cloud coverage sensor is selected, the integration automatically creates a cloud coverage sensor. This sensor collects cloud data from the weather entity and works **from day 1**. LTS history (>10 days) builds up automatically.

data.sensor_clouds: Cloud Coverage Sensor (Optional — leave empty: auto-sensor is created automatically, works from day 1)
data.pv_history_days: Days of cloud history to use (only applies when a cloud coverage sensor is selected above; default: 30)

error.invalid_db_url: Invalid database URL or connection failed
error.sqlite_required: Only SQLite is supported! URL must start with 'sqlite://'.
error.sensor_pv_required: PV panel energy sensor is required
error.must_be_weather_entity: Please select a weather entity from the list (weather.*)
error.must_be_sensor_entity: Please select a sensor from the list (sensor.*)
error.sensor_pv_wrong_unit: The PV sensor must use kWh or Wh as its unit (device class: energy)
